creator: duffner@fh-konstanz.de
text:
===>  Configuring for netpbm-94.3.1
mv -f Makefile Makefile.bak
imake -DUseInstalled -I/usr/X11R6/lib/X11/config
make Makefiles
making Makefiles in ./pbm...
        mv -f Makefile Makefile.bak
making Makefiles in ./pgm...
        mv -f Makefile Makefile.bak
making Makefiles in ./ppm...
        mv -f Makefile Makefile.bak
making Makefiles in ./pnm...
        mv -f Makefile Makefile.bak
make includes
including in ././pbm...
including in ././pgm...
including in ././ppm...
including in ././pnm...
rm -f tifftopnm.o
cc -c -O2   -I.. -I../pbm -I../pgm -I../ppm -I/usr/local/include/tiff34  -I/usr/
X11R6/include -I/incl
ude  -DCSRG_BASED   -DFUNCPROTO=15 -DNARROWPROTO  -DLIBTIFF "-Dmain=tifftopnm_ma
in" tifftopnm.c
tifftopnm.c:31: tiffio.h: No such file or directory
*** Error code 1
